metadata.title: Ensenada Real Estate

hero.description: Explore Ensenada real estate — oceanfront condos, valley homes & lots near Valle de Guadalupe. Verified developers, bilingual support, 80 mi from San Diego.

features.title: Verified Developers, Clear Title
features.body: Every Ensenada development on our platform has passed a rigorous due diligence review — judicial records, corporate filings, and project documentation included. We help you identify builders with a clean track record before you commit a single dollar.

features.title: Wine Country, Ocean Views, and Real Value
features.body: Ensenada is the only place in Baja where you can own oceanfront property and be 20 minutes from one of Mexico's premier wine regions. Valle de Guadalupe adds a lifestyle dimension that sets Ensenada real estate apart — world-class restaurants, boutique wineries, and a culinary scene that rivals Napa, at a fraction of the cost.

features.title: Bilingual Support for American Buyers
features.body: We specialize in guiding U.S. and Canadian buyers through Ensenada real estate transactions — from property selection and fideicomiso setup to notary coordination and closing. We speak your language, know the local market, and make the cross-border process straightforward.

seoBlock.heading: Properties for sale in Ensenada
seoBlock.body: Ensenada real estate offers something increasingly rare: a genuine Pacific coast city with culture, wine, and ocean access — at prices that make California buyers do a double take. Located 80 miles south of San Diego, Ensenada is Baja California's most cosmopolitan seaside destination, home to a thriving food and wine scene, world-class sportfishing, and a growing expat community drawn by the quality of life and the value. Whether you're searching for an oceanfront condo, a countryside home near the Valle de Guadalupe wine region, or a lot to build your dream retreat, Ensenada delivers a diversity of real estate that few Pacific coast cities can match. Each development featured here has been carefully vetted for legal transparency and developer integrity — so you can explore Ensenada real estate with confidence.
